platform_decisions.decision: Issue triage automation triggers on issue.opened and issue_comment.created (human-only, not bot comments)
platform_decisions.rationale: Separation of human signal from bot noise. Triage should respond to human interactions but avoid cascading bot loops. Filters: github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot'

platform_decisions.decision: Concurrent triage jobs use issue-level locking with cancel-in-progress=true
platform_decisions.rationale: Prevent duplicate triage runs on same issue. Latest triage request wins. Concurrency group: issue-triage-${{ github.event.issue.number }}

platform_decisions.decision: Claude Code triage permits all non-write users via allowed_non_write_users: '*'
platform_decisions.rationale: Enable community issue triage without requiring write access. Read-only GitHub token acceptable for triage classification tasks.

platform_decisions.decision: Issue lifecycle comments posted by scheduled label event, not by triage step itself
platform_decisions.rationale: Decouple triage labeling logic from lifecycle messaging. Label application triggers separate workflow (issue-lifecycle-comment.yml) which calls bun script to post context-aware messages.

platform_decisions.decision: Non-write-users-check prevents PR merges that modify allowed_non_write_users without human review
platform_decisions.rationale: Security gate for permission escalation. Detects changes to .github/*.yml that add allowed_non_write_users param, blocks with comment requesting AppSec review.

platform_decisions.decision: Duplicate detection idempotence via comment marker (<!-- non-write-users-check -->)
platform_decisions.rationale: Avoid re-commenting on same PR. Workflow checks existing comments for marker before posting. Prevents spam on iterative PRs.

platform_decisions.decision: Issue deduplication workflow triggers on issue.opened OR workflow_dispatch (manual backfill)
platform_decisions.rationale: Auto-detect new duplicates immediately, allow manual backfill over issue history (90 days default). Permits both automated and scheduled catch-up runs.

platform_decisions.decision: Statsig event logging in dedup workflow runs even if dedupe fails (if: always())
platform_decisions.rationale: Observability over success. Track all dedup attempts (success/failure) for analytics. Decoupled from business logic.

platform_decisions.decision: Stale issue locking scheduled at 14:00 UTC daily (8am Pacific during DST)
platform_decisions.rationale: Time-based maintenance window outside peak US hours. 7-day inactivity threshold before lock. Batch locking reduces API load.

platform_decisions.decision: Issue lock adds comment before locking, skips PRs, respects existing locks
platform_decisions.rationale: Give context to users why issue locked. Separate issues from PRs (different lifecycle). Don't re-lock already-locked issues.

platform_decisions.decision: Auto-close duplicates runs on cron schedule (09:00 UTC daily) via bun script, not API directly
platform_decisions.rationale: Batch processing reduces API load. Bun script provides flexibility for complex duplicate detection logic (likely ML-based).

platform_decisions.decision: Autoclose label removal triggered on issue_comment.created (human comments only, not bot)
platform_decisions.rationale: Human activity removes autoclose label, letting issues stay open if user responds. Filters out github-actions[bot] comments to avoid noise.

platform_decisions.decision: Issue lifecycle timeouts enforced twice daily (10:00 and 22:00 UTC)
platform_decisions.rationale: Global schedules to ensure even coverage across timezones. 22:00 UTC catches APAC morning hours. Concurrency group: daily-issue-sweep prevents overlaps.

platform_decisions.decision: Issue opened dispatch sends to external repo via repository dispatch event
platform_decisions.rationale: Decouple issue tracking from downstream systems. Target repo stored in secret (ISSUE_OPENED_DISPATCH_TARGET_REPO). Graceful exit on dispatch failure (|| exit 0).

platform_decisions.decision: Event logging to Statsig escapes shell variables via environment vars, not template injection
platform_decisions.rationale: Injection attack prevention. All user-controlled values (title, author, etc.) passed via env vars. Sed escapes quotes in title before curl.

platform_decisions.decision: @claude mention in issue/PR triggers Claude Code action (must contain @claude in body/title/comment/review)
platform_decisions.rationale: Opt-in activation. Prevents Claude from running on every issue. Covers issue body, title, comment, and PR review mentions.

platform_decisions.decision: Claude Code action permissions: contents:read, pull-requests:read, issues:read, id-token:write
platform_decisions.rationale: Minimal privileges. Read-only for repo content. id-token:write allows OIDC federation for API auth (no explicit secrets passed).

platform_decisions.decision: Blank issues disabled (blank_issues_enabled: false) with contact_links to Discord/docs
platform_decisions.rationale: Force structured reporting. Direct lost users to support channels (Discord, docs, troubleshooting). Reduces low-signal issues.

platform_decisions.decision: Bug report preflight checklist enforces version check, existing issue search, and single-bug-per-issue rule
platform_decisions.rationale: Reduce duplicate reports and out-of-date reports. Force users to confirm latest version before reporting. Cognitive barrier to multi-bug reports.

platform_decisions.decision: Bug report captures regression detection (yes/no/unknown) and last-working-version
platform_decisions.rationale: Triage hint. Regressions often easy to fix if bisect is clear. Unknown/don't-know answers still valuable for triage prioritization.

platform_decisions.decision: Bug report requires platform, OS, terminal/shell, and Claude model selection
platform_decisions.rationale: Environment specificity. Bugs often tied to platform/OS/terminal combo. Model selection helps identify model-specific regression.

platform_decisions.decision: Feature request preflight enforces single-feature-per-issue and duplicate search
platform_decisions.rationale: Avoid feature fragmentation. One feature per issue allows independent voting/prioritization. Duplicate search prevents bikeshedding.

platform_decisions.decision: Feature request separates problem statement from proposed solution (avoid leading the solution)
platform_decisions.rationale: Problem-first mindset. Capture user pain point before solution design. Allows triage team to suggest alternative solutions.

platform_decisions.decision: Feature request requires priority (critical/high/medium/low) and feature category selection
platform_decisions.rationale: Prioritization metadata. Priority + category allows bulk triage and roadmap planning. User-declared priority guides team focus.

platform_decisions.decision: Model behavior template captures behavior type (file modification, permission, assumptions) to isolate safety issues
platform_decisions.rationale: Safety triage. Separate unexpected-but-harmless behavior from genuine safety violations (file access, permission bypass). Enables fast path for safety issues.

platform_decisions.decision: Model behavior template requires reproduction steps and capture of exact prompt + actual behavior + expected behavior
platform_decisions.rationale: Reproducibility for model behavior debugging. Exact prompt crucial for model tracing. Step-by-step allows triage team to reproduce in isolation.

platform_decisions.decision: Model behavior template captures permission mode (Accept Edits on/off/unknown) and reproducibility (always/sometimes/once)
platform_decisions.rationale: Context for root cause. Permission mode determines if changes were auto-approved or human-approved. Reproducibility guides investigation strategy (regression vs edge case).

platform_decisions.decision: Documentation template categorizes issues (missing/unclear/incorrect/typo/broken links) to separate content gaps from quality issues
platform_decisions.rationale: Clear separation of concerns. Missing docs need authoring. Unclear/incorrect docs need editing. Typos/links need quick fixes. Enables parallel triage tracks.

platform_decisions.decision: Documentation template requires impact assessment (high/medium/low) to prioritize high-impact gaps
platform_decisions.rationale: ROI-driven docs work. High-impact issues (blocks usage) prioritized over nice-to-have improvements. Allows triage to cut scope in documentation sprints.

platform_decisions.decision: Backfill duplicate comments supports dry-run mode via workflow_dispatch input
platform_decisions.rationale: Safe testing of bulk operations. Dry-run logs what would be done without side effects. Allows human verification before production run.

platform_decisions.decision: Backfill duplicate comments defaults to 90 days lookback, customizable via workflow_dispatch
platform_decisions.rationale: Balance coverage with scope. 90 days captures most active issues without overwhelming queue. Customization allows focused backfills (e.g., last 30 days).
